settings.title: We Craft Digital Experiences That Drive Growth

settings.editor: We design and develop stunning websites, powerful e-commerce stores, and result-driven digital marketing strategies for businesses across Sri Lanka and beyond.
Custom WordPress and Elementor websites built for performance, aesthetics, and conversions.
WooCommerce and Shopify stores with payment integration, inventory management, and seamless checkout.
SEO, social media marketing, Google Ads, and content strategy to grow your online presence.
Logo design, brand guidelines, and visual identity systems that make your business stand out.
Native and cross-platform mobile apps for iOS and Android with modern UI and great performance.
Reliable hosting, security updates, backups, and ongoing technical support for your website.

settings.title: We Build Websites That Grow Businesses

settings.editor: Every pixel, every line of code is designed with one goal: growing your business. Our team combines creativity with technical expertise to deliver digital solutions that truly perform.
We learn about your business, goals, audience, and competitors to build a solid strategy.
We create wireframes and mockups, refining the design until you love every detail.
We build your site with clean code, fast load times, and full responsiveness across all devices.
We deploy, test thoroughly, and provide training so you can manage your site with confidence.
PixelCraft transformed our outdated website into a modern, conversion-focused platform. Our leads increased by 200% in the first month!
